zh.lifeSummary: Edmund Yorke是Unknown Yorke和Unknown的兒子，於大約1543年出生。他於1568年9月7日與Katherine Robins在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於從1614年11月18日到1615年2月14日，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edmund Yorke是Unknown Yorke和Unknown的儿子，于大约1543年出生。他于1568年9月7日与Katherine Robins在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于从1614年11月18日到1615年2月14日，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Yorke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: York
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of York in northern England. The surname is now widespread throughout England. Originally, the city bore the Latin name Eburacum, which is probably from a Brittonic name meaning ‘yew-tree place’. This was altered by folk etymology to Old English Eoforwīc (from the elements eofor ‘wild boar’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’). This name was taken over by Scandinavian settlers, who altered it back to opacity in the form Jórvík or Jórk (English York, which became finally settled as the placename in the 13th century). The surname has also been adopted by Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of the East Slavic patronymic   Yurkovich   or its Croatian, Slovak, or Slovenian variants. Compare   Yurk  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Edmund Yorke was born about 1543 as the son of Unknown Yorke and Unknown. He married Katherine Robins on 7 September 1568, in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died from 18 November 1614 to 14 February 1615, and was buried in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Edmund Yorke est né environ 1543, fils de Unknown Yorke et Unknown. Il a épousé Katherine Robins le 7 septembre 1568, à Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé du 18 novembre 1614 au 14 février 1615, et a été enterré à Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Edmund Yorke wurde um 1543, als Sohn von Unknown Yorke und Unknown geboren. Er hat am 7. September 1568 in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England Katherine Robins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb von 18. November 1614 bis 14. Februar 1615 und wurde in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Edmund Yorke è nato il circa 1543 come figlio di Unknown Yorke e Unknown. Lui sposato Katherine Robins il 7 settembre 1568, nel Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì da 18 novembre 1614 a 14 febbraio 1615, e fu sepolto a Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Yorkeは約1543年にUnknown YorkeとUnknownの息子として生まれた。1568年9月7日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーディングストーンでKatherine Robinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はから1614年11月18日まで1615年2月14日に死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーディングストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Yorke(은)는 대략 1543년 Unknown Yorke(와)과 Unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1568년 9월 7일 영국 노르섬프토실르 하르딩스톤에서 Katherine Robins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1614년 11월 18일부터 1615년 2월 14일까지 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 하르딩스톤에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Edmund Yorke родился около 1543 г. Его родителей звали Unknown Yorke и Unknown. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Robins 7 сентября 1568 г. в местности хардингстоун, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер с 18 ноября 1614 по 14 февраля 1615 и был похоронен в местности хардингстоун, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
